summary: The diff implements most requirements well. The backend Motoko actor, frontend pages (Home, Pricing, FAQ), navbar, footer, background removal tool, and React Query hooks are all present. The main gap is the absence of the static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated (REQ-8). Additionally, REQ-3 mentions a dedicated 'Remove Background' action button separate from the upload trigger, which appears to be missing based on the tool's flow.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and render static image assets (hero background, logo mark, 3 step icons) served from frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: No image asset files are present in the diff. The code references /assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, /assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_256x256.png, /assets/generated/step-upload.dim_128x128.png, /assets/generated/step-ai.dim_128x128.png, and /assets/generated/step-download.dim_128x128.png, but none of these files were added.

missing_requirements.requirement: A dedicated 'Remove Background' action button must be present in the tool UI
missing_requirements.reason: The BackgroundRemovalTool component triggers processing automatically on file drop/select rather than having a separate 'Remove Background' button the user clicks after upload. The acceptance criteria explicitly lists a 'Remove Background' action button as a required UI element.

hallucinated_features.description: FAQ page contains 9 accordion items instead of the required minimum of 6
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 requests at least 6 FAQ items covering specific topics. The implementation provides 9 items including additional topics like maximum file size and commercial use that were not specified in the requirements.
